title: Axolotl Bucket Variants
description: Shows the axolotl variant in buckets
body:
Shows the variant of axolotl in buckets.

For versions **1.21.5 and above**: no mods required  
For versions **1.17 to 1.21.4**: Requires [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) or optifine


![showcase image](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/Kn6gOLwE/images/6c966cc4deeb84a42ff74fc798ca83979cfda1a3.png)
